title: Senior Teacher - Delhi University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Delhi University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!
